title: Driver Jamuna
subTitle: Jamuna, a cab driver, accidentally becomes an accomplice to a crime. Later, she tries to get herself out of the mess she is dragged in.

title: Naandhi
subTitle: Surya, an IT professional, is wrongly accused in a high-profile murder case and spends years enduring abuse and languishing in prison waiting for his trial.

title: Comedy Station
subTitle: Various talented comedians perform hilarious skits and stand-up acts on diverse themes and topics to entertain the audience.

subTitle: Various talented comedians perform hilarious skits and stand-up acts on diverse themes and topics to entertain the audience.

title: Dam Sharks!
subTitle: Executives on a weekend trip find themselves in danger when they learn that a storm has caused the local river to become infested with sharks.

title: Vicky Vidya Ka Woh Wala Video
subTitle: The bonding between a freshly married couple gets threatened when a CD containing their private clips goes missing. Soon, they both navigate through hilarious experiences.

title: Namastey, London
subTitle: On a trip to India, Jasmeet's father forcefully marries her off to Arjun. However, when they return to London, Jasmeet announces her intention of marrying her boyfriend, Charlie Brown.

title: Bhool Chuk Maaf
subTitle: A young man, from a small town, with romantic inclinations gets gainfully employed to marry the woman he desires. However, he breaks an oath to Lord Shiva and becomes trapped for his reneging.

title: Kung Fu Hustle
subTitle: An aspiring gangster pretends to be part of a notorious gang and tries to terrorise a neighbourhood. However, unknown to him, three martial arts experts live there and are ready to take him down.

title: CID
subTitle: After a car crash, prominent businessman Viraj makes headlines as he is rushed to the hospital. Later, Team CID gets involved when Viraj disappears from his hospital room and leaves a dead body behind.

title: CID
subTitle: The CID team tries to crack the mysterious plan of the criminal biker group. However, Golendo and his men hoodwink the team and storm the government gold reserve.

title: CID
subTitle: A fallen chandelier leads to a woman's puzzling death in her home, prompting a CID investigation. Meanwhile, the detectives discover unusual circumstances surrounding the incident.

title: CID
subTitle: When Daya discovers a skeleton buried in a divider, the CID team interrogates the contractor who built the divider to find some clues.

title: CID
subTitle: Two elevator servicemen, while on their inspection rounds, witness three goons about to murder a man. The goons, not wanting to leave any witnesses, pursue the servicemen.

title: Vanangaan
subTitle: A vigilante with a hearing impairment faces punishment for his various crimes against the injustices of society.

title: Narappa
subTitle: After his elder brother is killed by an upper-caste landlord, Sinappa murders him. As a result, Narappa, his father, is forced to flee with him and fight a prejudiced system to secure their future.

title: Atrangi Re
subTitle: Chaos ensues when a runaway woman gets forcefully married to a man who is already engaged. The situation turns murkier when the girl's boyfriend enters their lives.

title: Hero
subTitle: In order to settle scores with a police commissioner, a gangster hires a hitman, Jackie to abduct his daughter, Radha. But Jackie ends up falling in love with her and undergoes a transformation.

title: Heart Attack 3
subTitle: A man falls head over heels in love with a woman and takes on a new identity in an attempt to impress her. Along the way, he also seeks the help of her dog to try and win her over.

title: Main Hoon Wanted
subTitle: A vagabond leads a carefree life and does anything for money. However, he lands in a difficult position when not only gangsters but also the police want to get their hands on him.

title: Pelli SandaD
subTitle: An aspiring filmmaker forces a story out of a Dronacharya awardee, Vashishta, who lived a memorable life wherein he found a beautiful love and professional success.

title: CID
subTitle: ACP Pradyuman visits his friend's house for a dinner party, where one of the guests is found dead. Later, the CID team arrives with DCP Chitrole who is adamant to arrest the ACP.

title: C.I.D.
subTitle: An ambitious girl who wishes to excel in her exams, asks for a wish on the step of a staircase. The team investigates the murder of her competitor who visited the same mansion.

title: CID
subTitle: A dead body is found in the forest, with suspicions of the Gilheri Rakshas's involvement. Further, CID takes on the case to uncover the truth behind this mysterious death.

title: CID

title: CID
subTitle: While enjoying a family picnic in the woods, the body of an unconscious girl is found smeared in blood. Upon examining the blood, the forensic team reveals that the blood belongs to three individuals.

title: CID
subTitle: On finding her brother Vinod murdered in the house, Priti informs Team CID about the matter. Soon, the team finds out that Vinod was involved in trading illegal medicines.

title: CID
subTitle: A group of boys discover the dead body of a scuba diver and inform the CID team about it. On investigating the matter, the team discovers that the man was murdered.

title: Naaraaz
subTitle: Deva, a peasant, always fights for the welfare of his fellow villagers. Later, circumstances force him to flee to Malaysia where he locks horns with Taoke.

title: WAH Extraaa
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Plan
subTitle: Four friends Bobby, Lucky, Jai and Omi arrive in Mumbai with dreams of making it big. They kidnap a businessman hoping to extort money from him, but he turns out to be a gangster.

title: Bewares
subTitle: Lucky, nicknamed Bewars, is a aimless young man who frequently argues with his father about his dream of becoming a pilot.

title: Aaviri
subTitle: Following their eldest daughter's death, a family settles in an old house where the younger girl sees a ghost. The father must face his past to save her from a haunting entity.

title: Savyasachi
subTitle: One of Vikram's hands is not under the control of his mind. Being a victim of vanishing twin syndrome, Vikram's unseen twin brother comes through for him in the time of need.

title: Krishnarjuna Yudham
subTitle: Krishna and Arjun are lookalikes from different parts of the world, who must work together to find the women they love after they are kidnapped.
